abrp_send.name: Send ABRP Telemetry
abrp_send.description: Upload live vehicle telemetry data to ABRP for route planning.

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.description: Your ABRP Telemetry API key. Used in the Authorization header.

abrp_acknowledge.name: Acknowledge ABRP Upload
abrp_acknowledge.description: Resets the ABRP Data Changed sensor after a successful upload.
